library: בית המדרש לרבנים · בית המדרש לרבנים
description: Business accounts. In Judaeo-Arabic. The hand may be known. Dating: 11th century. A sum of 180 dinars appears. Mentions goods such as: pepper, flax, garments. Mentions people such as: Ibn ʿAwkal, al-Ḥamrāwī, al-ʿArīf, al-Shāmī, Barakāt b. Saʿāda. Mentions places such as Alexandria and Rashīd. Probably a join with  ENA 3740.6.
description_he: רשימה או טבלה ביהודית-ערבית. מוחזק בבית המדרש לרבנים.
